overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a neon-lit urban environment at night. The player moves from a covered walkway with rainbow light installations and graffiti-covered walls, through a garden corridor, up stairs to an open plaza, and across a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles to reach the La Huesuda building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway, passing by a tattooed man standing against the graffiti-covered wall

notable_agents.action: tattooed man standing against wall who steps aside as camera approaches

entered.detail: overhead installation of curved neon tubes in rainbow colors spanning the walkway
dark concrete wall with red trim running along the left side
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
glowing purple holographic sign floating near the upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by a vibrant rainbow neon canopy overhead. The camera moves forward past a concrete barrier on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right, passing close to a tattooed NPC standing against the wall. The environment is sheltered with scattered papers on the concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered garden walkway with benches and planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway lined with wooden benches and tropical planter boxes

entered.detail: orange-brown wooden seating attached to concrete planters
rectangular concrete planters containing tropical plants and ferns
vertical garden wall with dense foliage replacing the graffiti concrete

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions from urban graffiti to a more manicured garden aesthetic with wooden benches and lush planter boxes lining the right side. The rainbow light canopy continues overhead as the camera moves through this empty pedestrian corridor, with the concrete barrier still present on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending stairs from covered walkway to open plaza

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open plaza with the La Huesuda building visible ahead
ascending stairs to reach the upper street level

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs while transitioning from the covered walkway to the open plaza with the La Huesuda building visible ahead

entered.detail: large multi-story building with prominent signage and mural of faces with flowers
tropical palm trees in large planters marking the transition to open space
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends stairs transitioning from the enclosed walkway to an open plaza. The rainbow canopy fades to the left as the La Huesuda building comes into view ahead, marked by its distinctive mural. Palm trees and traffic infrastructure signal the approach to the busy street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with futuristic traffic

events.description: beginning to cross the busy intersection as futuristic vehicles pass by
multiple futuristic cars and trucks drive through the intersection while crossing continues

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy street at a crosswalk, navigating through futuristic vehicles passing in both directions

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
blue truck passing through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: large glowing advertisements and digital screens on building facades
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
various sci-fi cars and trucks driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide-open urban intersection dominated by the La Huesuda building facade. Crossing the striped crosswalk, the player navigates through moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles while neon billboards illuminate the scene. The environment is fully exposed with the night sky visible above the towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance approach with pedestrian crossing

events.description: approaching the entrance of La Huesuda building with pedestrians crossing

agents.ego_description: walking toward the building entrance, passing pedestrians on the crosswalk and approaching the doorway

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large dark entranceway with geometric frame leading into the building
pink and yellow illuminated vending booth near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the La Huesuda building entrance, with the camera moving past a pink vending machine on the left and crossing pedestrians. The building facade looms large as the player nears the dark entranceway, transitioning from the open street to the building threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian walkway into a wide, bustling urban intersection at night. It begins under a vibrant rainbow canopy, gliding past graffiti-covered walls and a tattooed figure before the environment shifts into a manicured garden corridor lined with wooden benches and lush planters. As the camera ascends a set of stairs, the enclosed walkway opens up into a plaza where the rainbow lights fade and the La Huesuda building first appears behind palm trees. The scene then expands across a striped crosswalk filled with futuristic vehicles and glowing billboards, moving through the open city air toward the towering building facade. Finally, the camera passes a pink vending machine and other pedestrians to reach the dark threshold of the building entrance.
